name: storefront-fullstack
description: Full-stack e-commerce application — Angular 18 frontend + Node/Express backend + PostgreSQL

scripts.install: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: cd app/frontend && npm run build -- --configuration production
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.deploy:backend: cd app/backend && npm run build && eb deploy
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd app/frontend && npm run build -- --configuration production && aws s3 sync dist/full-stack-javascript-developer-course4-ex-nitha/browser s3://$S3_BUCKET_NAME --delete --acl public-read
